_comment: Account-scoring config — generated deterministically from _raw/spec.json by template/_build/build_weights.py. Every Sumble signal's source.api points at POST /v6/organizations with the exact select slice; score_accounts.py reproduces each column from it. Slider changes auto-save to this file in place.

source_kinds.first_party: joined in by account; not from Sumble.

provenance_guide.api_block: source.api = {endpoint, select_entity|select_attribute, read, extract}. select_entity is the exact select.entities[] item to send; read is the metric to take off the EntityResult. since entities are a 3-month window the scorer recomputes to (run date − 3 months).
provenance_guide.api_supported: true if score_accounts.py can reproduce the column from the public API. false (tech concentration) stays in the app for tuning but is dropped + weight-renormalised by the portable scorer.

customer_name: Sumble — Account Scoring (DEMO · fictitious gold set)

gold_list.source: FICTITIOUS — illustrative 'gold' set, NOT real customers

source.why: SDR is a target persona — more SDRs = bigger ACV.
Concentration filters out big orgs with a SDR per division.

inputs.name: employee_count_int
inputs.read: exact org headcount (employee_count is an integer; legacy band strings map to a midpoint)

source.why: Persona growth is a buying-window proxy — orgs growing SDR are scaling that function.

api.transform_note: endpoint returns a percent (e.g. 50.0); data.csv stores it as a ratio (× 0.01).

More capital raised = a bigger budget and a faster hiring ramp — more interviews to run.

inputs.name: funding_total_raised
inputs.read: total funding raised across all rounds, whole USD

source.why: A recent financing round means fresh capital and an imminent hiring ramp — an open buying window. Score decays as the last round ages; never-financed scores 0.

derivation.formula: days between funding_last_round_date and today, recency-scored (fewer days = higher; none = 0)

inputs.name: funding_last_round_date
inputs.read: date of the latest funding round (ISO YYYY-MM-DD)

source.why: A large most-recent round means fresh capital — an active hiring/buying window.

inputs.name: funding_last_round_raised
inputs.read: amount raised in the latest funding round, whole USD

source.why: Recent jobs hitting Generative AI AND an ICP tool signal an active, in-flight initiative — open buying window.

api.since_note: 3-month window; recompute `since` to run date − 3 months.

source.why: Recent Generative AI jobs for an ICP persona show who is staffing the project — buying-window + fit.

select_entity.term: project EQ 'generative_ai' AND job_function IN ('Sales Development Representative', 'Sales', 'Account Executive', 'Revenue Operations', 'Marketing')

api.extract: organizations[].entities[type='advanced_query',term="project EQ 'generative_ai' AND job_function IN ('Sales Development Representative', 'Sales', 'Account Executive', 'Revenue Operations', 'Marketing')"].job_post_count
api.since_note: 3-month window; recompute `since` to run date − 3 months.

source.why: Recent jobs hitting Digital Transformation AND an ICP tool signal an active, in-flight initiative — open buying window.

api.since_note: 3-month window; recompute `since` to run date − 3 months.

source.why: Recent Digital Transformation jobs for an ICP persona show who is staffing the project — buying-window + fit.

select_entity.term: project EQ 'digital_transformation' AND job_function IN ('Sales Development Representative', 'Sales', 'Account Executive', 'Revenue Operations', 'Marketing')

api.extract: organizations[].entities[type='advanced_query',term="project EQ 'digital_transformation' AND job_function IN ('Sales Development Representative', 'Sales', 'Account Executive', 'Revenue Operations', 'Marketing')"].job_post_count
api.since_note: 3-month window; recompute `since` to run date − 3 months.

_demo_notice: PUBLIC EXAMPLE. The account universe is real public companies, but the is_icp_gold flags are a FICTITIOUS, illustrative set (a deterministic mix designed to look indicative) and do NOT represent Sumble's actual customers.
